# Phase 0 — Baseline Inventory

**Status:** Read-only ground truth. Do not edit — file an ADR.
**Landed:** `e61db62` 2026-05-20 (merge commit on `main`)
**Branch:** `phase-0-inventory` (preserved for history)

This directory contains the pre-refactor truth snapshot that guided Phase 1
docs consolidation. These files are intentionally archived under
`docs/archive/` to prevent confusion with canonical docs.

If you need to update or extend the inventory, do not edit these files.
Instead, file an Architecture Decision Record (ADR) under `docs/adr/` that
references the relevant inventory row and describes the change.
